the nine regions on the basis of constellations. Similarly different
animate and inanimate objects are assigned to the jurisdiction of the
asterisms, and countries, peoples, etc. to the domain of planets,3
In the third section he treats of the effects of years, months and
days presided over by the different planets.4
In the next section subjects like cloud-formation, winds, rain-
fall, etc. are expounded.5
In the fifth section flowers and creepers are discussed.6 The
Sixth section deals with portents like earthquakes, glow at the horizon,
meteors, halos, etc.7 The next group treats of the growth of crops,
commodities, prices and trade.8 In the eighth section are explained
rituals for the improvement of royal powers.9 The ninth one explains
signs of men and women.10 The tenth one deals with architecture,
